list-pdf-form-field-names.title: List PDF Form Field Names with FormEditor
list-pdf-form-field-names.description: Shows how to load a PDF, bind it to a FormEditor, retrieve all AcroForm field names, and print them to the console.

add-text-field-to-pdf-using-formeditor.title: Add Text Field to PDF Using FormEditor
add-text-field-to-pdf-using-formeditor.description: Shows how to insert a new text field at specific coordinates into an existing PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor facade.

fill-textbox-field-in-pdf.title: Fill TextBox Field in PDF Using Aspose.Pdf Form Facade
fill-textbox-field-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, fill a specific AcroForm text box field with a string value using the Form facade, and save the updated document.

justify-text-in-pdf-form-textbox.title: Justify Text in a PDF Form TextBox
justify-text-in-pdf-form-textbox.description: Shows how to set justified alignment for a filled textbox field in an AcroForm by configuring FormFieldFacade and calling FormEditor.DecorateField.

retrieve-radio-button-options-hashtable.title: Retrieve Radio Button Options and Store in Hashtable
retrieve-radio-button-options-hashtable.description: Creates a PDF with a radio‑button group, then uses the Form facade to read all option display names and export values via GetButtonOptionValues and copies them into a Hashtable.

get-selected-radio-button-value.title: Get Selected Radio Button Value from PDF Form
get-selected-radio-button-value.description: Demonstrates how to open a PDF form with the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form class and retrieve the currently selected option of a radio button group using GetButtonOptionCurrentValue.

export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML
export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form to export all AcroForm field values from a PDF document into an XML file.

export-pdf-form-data-to-fdf.title: Export PDF Form Data to FDF
export-pdf-form-data-to-fdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form to export the field values of a PDF form into an FDF file via a file stream.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-xfdf.title: Export PDF Form Fields to XFDF
export-pdf-form-fields-to-xfdf.description: Shows how to export all form field values from a PDF document to an XFDF file using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form class.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-json.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON and Validate Structure
export-pdf-form-fields-to-json.description: Shows how to export AcroForm field values from a PDF to a JSON file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form.ExportJson and then verifies the resulting JSON structure.

import-form-data-from-xml-to-pdf.title: Import Form Field Values from XML into PDF
import-form-data-from-xml-to-pdf.description: Shows how to read an XML file with AcroForm field values and import them into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form, then save the populated document.

import-fdf-data-into-pdf-form.title: Import FDF Data into PDF Form
import-fdf-data-into-pdf-form.description: Shows how to open a PDF form, import field values from an FDF file via a file stream, and save the resulting filled PDF.

import-xfdf-data-into-pdf.title: Import XFDF Data into PDF Form
import-xfdf-data-into-pdf.description: Shows how to import form field values from an XFDF file into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form and save the updated document.

import-json-data-into-pdf-form.title: Import JSON Data into PDF Form
import-json-data-into-pdf-form.description: Shows how to load a PDF form, import field values from a JSON file using Form.ImportJson, and save the updated PDF while handling possible errors.

batch-export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.title: Batch Export PDF Form Data to XML
batch-export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.description: Shows how to loop through PDF files, bind each to a FormEditor, and export the AcroForm data to individual XML files using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-import-json-data-into-pdfs.title: Batch Import JSON Data into PDFs in Parallel
batch-import-json-data-into-pdfs.description: Shows how to import form data from matching JSON files into PDF documents using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form and process multiple files concurrently with Parallel.ForEach.

combine-exported-json-from-multiple-pdf-.title: Combine Exported JSON from Multiple PDF Forms
combine-exported-json-from-multiple-pdf-.description: Shows how to export AcroForm data from several PDFs as JSON, merge the fragments into a single JSON array, and write the result to a file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

export-pdf-form-data-to-xml-memorystream.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML Using MemoryStream
export-pdf-form-data-to-xml-memorystream.description: Demonstrates exporting AcroForm fields from a PDF to an XML string with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form and a MemoryStream, eliminating the need for intermediate files.

merge-acroform-data-into-json.title: Merge AcroForm Data from Multiple PDFs into JSON
merge-acroform-data-into-json.description: The example loads several PDF files, extracts each AcroForm field value, aggregates the values per field across all documents, and writes the result as a JSON file.

filter-pdf-form-fields-by-name.title: Filter PDF Form Fields by Name and Export to XML
filter-pdf-form-fields-by-name.description: Loads a PDF form, exports its fields to XFDF XML, keeps only fields whose names start with "Customer", and saves the filtered XML to a file.

export-selected-acroform-fields-to-json.title: Export Selected AcroForm Fields to JSON
export-selected-acroform-fields-to-json.description: Shows how to export only specific form fields from a PDF by exporting all fields to JSON, filtering by a list of field names, and writing the filtered result to a file.

import-form-data-from-json.title: Import Form Data from JSON into PDF (ignore missing fields)
import-form-data-from-json.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF, import AcroForm field values from a JSON file while automatically ignoring fields that are not present in the PDF, and save the updated document.

validate-xml-import-into-pdf-form.title: Validate XML Against XSD and Import into PDF Form
validate-xml-import-into-pdf-form.description: Shows how to validate an XML file using an XSD schema and then import the validated data into an AcroForm PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

unicode-form-field-utf8-export-import.title: Handle Unicode Form Field Values with UTF-8 Export/Import
unicode-form-field-utf8-export-import.description: Demonstrates exporting AcroForm field values to an XML file using UTF‑8 encoding and importing them back into a PDF, preserving Unicode characters.

list-pdf-form-fields-to-csv.title: List PDF Form Fields and Export to CSV
list-pdf-form-fields-to-csv.description: Shows how to bind a PDF with FormEditor, retrieve all AcroForm field names and types via the Form facade, and write the results to a CSV report.

export-text-form-field-names-to-json.title: Export Text Form Field Names to JSON
export-text-form-field-names-to-json.description: Loads a PDF containing AcroForm fields, filters the fields to keep only text fields, and writes the collected field names to a JSON array file.

add-radio-button-group-default-selection.title: Add Radio Button Group with Default Selection using FormEditor
add-radio-button-group-default-selection.description: Shows how to create a PDF, initialize FormEditor, configure a radio button group with three options, set a default selected option programmatically, and save the file.

validate-radio-button-options.title: Validate Radio Button Options in a PDF Form
validate-radio-button-options.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with a radio button group, adding options, and using the Form facade to retrieve and verify the export values against an expected set.

roundtrip-xfdf-export-import.title: Round‑Trip XFDF Export/Import for AcroForm Fields
roundtrip-xfdf-export-import.description: Shows how to fill an AcroForm, export its data to XFDF, import the XFDF back into a fresh form, and verify that all field values are preserved.

fill-pdf-acroform-fields-from-json.title: Fill PDF AcroForm Fields from JSON
fill-pdf-acroform-fields-from-json.description: Shows how to read a JSON file into a dictionary and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form to map JSON keys to AcroForm field names, fill those fields, and save the resulting PDF.

fill-pdf-form-fields-from-byte-array.title: Fill PDF Form Fields from Byte Array
fill-pdf-form-fields-from-byte-array.description: Shows how to load a PDF from a byte array using MemoryStream, fill AcroForm fields with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form, and return the updated PDF as a byte array.

extract-pdf-form-field-names.title: Extract PDF Form Field Names to JSON
extract-pdf-form-field-names.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form, retrieve all AcroForm field names, and output them as a JSON array on the console.

fill-pdf-acroform-fields.title: Fill PDF AcroForm Fields with Aspose.Pdf
fill-pdf-acroform-fields.description: Shows how to open a PDF, populate its AcroForm fields from a dictionary, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

export-acroform-data-to-json.title: Export AcroForm Data to JSON and Deserialize
export-acroform-data-to-json.description: Creates a PDF with AcroForm fields, exports the form values to a JSON file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form, and deserializes the JSON into a strongly‑typed C# object with Json.NET.

import-json-data-into-pdf-form__v2.title: Import JSON Data into PDF Form Using Aspose.Pdf
import-json-data-into-pdf-form__v2.description: Shows how to serialize a C# object to JSON, load it into a memory stream, and import the data into an AcroForm PDF using the Aspose.Pdf Form facade.

export-acroform-data-to-json-split-files.title: Export AcroForm Data to JSON and Split into Multiple Files
export-acroform-data-to-json-split-files.description: Demonstrates exporting all form fields from a PDF AcroForm to a JSON array with Aspose.Pdf, then dividing the array into chunks of up to 100 fields and writing each chunk to separate JSON files.

export-pdf-form-data-to-html.title: Export PDF Form Data to HTML via XML and XSLT
export-pdf-form-data-to-html.description: Shows how to export AcroForm fields from a PDF to an XML file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form and then transform that XML into an HTML view with an XSLT stylesheet.

import-xml-data-validate-required-fields.title: Import XML Data into PDF Form and Validate Required Fields
import-xml-data-validate-required-fields.description: Demonstrates how to import XML data into an AcroForm PDF using Aspose.Pdf, then checks required fields for empty values and logs any violations before saving the result.

import-acroform-data-from-xml-with-missi.title: Import AcroForm Data from XML with Missing Field Reporting
import-acroform-data-from-xml-with-missi.description: Demonstrates how to import AcroForm field values from an XML file into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form, and how to detect and log fields that are missing in the PDF.

async-export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.title: Asynchronously Export PDF Form Data to XML
async-export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.description: Shows how to use async/await with Aspose.Pdf to export AcroForm fields from a PDF document to an XML file without blocking the UI thread.

generate-pdf-form-field-report.title: Generate PDF Form Field Report with Table
generate-pdf-form-field-report.description: Creates a PDF report that lists all AcroForm fields, showing each field's name, type, and value in a table.
